svg.text: IoT Bicycle Watt Meter - GPIO Mapping Schematic
KiCad 10-style schematic diagram | Source: Google Sheet GPIO Mapping
- HX711 logic/supply: 3.3V to match ESP32 GPIO.
- Do not connect 5V HX711 DOUT directly to GPIO32.
- OLED and MPU6050 share SDA=GPIO21, SCL=GPIO22.
Sheet: IoT Watt Meter Implementation Plan / GPIO Mapping
Diagram type: KiCad 10-style GPIO schematic (deterministic SVG/PNG)
